title: A new Reagent O-(P-Toluyl Sulphonamido) Aniline for Spectrophotometric Determination of Cerium (IV)
author: Wahid U. Malik
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The red coloured complex formed by cerium (iv),with o-( p -Toluyl-sulphonamido) aniline, forms the basis of a very sensitive colorimetric method for the determination of traces of the metal. The complex shows maximum absorbance at 480 m μ  where the reagent has negligible absorption. Many cations and anions are without effect on the complex. A composition study by various usual methods shows that 1 : 2 complex formed.
steps_raw: The red coloured complex formed by cerium (iv),with o-( p -Toluyl-sulphonamido) aniline, forms the basis of a very sensitive colorimetric method for the determination of traces of the metal. A composition study by various usual methods shows that 1 : 2 complex formed.
